SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-28-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-11-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PER STIPULATION. DEFT'S REQUEST TO VACATE THE DISMISSAL OF DEFT'S CLAIM IS GRANTED. DEFT'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED TO COURT ON 3/28/01 WERE RETURNED TO DEFT. IN COURT ON 5/7/01.
